positive: A sophisticated celestial wildlife montage featuring stylized, symmetrical creatures of the night—such as crescent moon foxes, nebula-winged owls, and constellations-horned deer—interacting around a central, stylized geometric mandala. The style should be a blend of ethereal Art Nouveau illustration and modern minimalist vector design. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, starlight silver, and muted gold accents. The composition must be perfectly circular and highly detailed, suitable for a repeat pattern or central chest print on apparel. Lighting should be soft, magical, and emanating from the subject matter itself. High contrast, clean silhouettes, ultra-detailed linework, graphic novel quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, low resolution, amateur, cartoonish, realistic photography, bokeh
